ourStoryDescription: Born from a love of creamy, handcrafted flavors, our ice cream shop has been serving scoops of happiness since day one. We source the finest ingredients — from sun-ripened cherries to freshly roasted walnuts — and churn every batch with care. Whether you crave a classic cone or a bold new creation, each bite is made to melt your heart.
ingredientsDescription: Every scoop starts with the best nature has to offer. We carefully select premium, locally sourced ingredients — from hand-picked cherries and wild mint to freshly cracked walnuts — to craft ice creams that are as beautiful as they are delicious.
ingredientsImgAlt: A vibrant display of fresh ice cream ingredients
woltMeta: Order your favorite ice cream through Wolt. Fast, reliable delivery straight to your door.
iceMeta: Order directly from us and enjoy exclusive deals, loyalty rewards, and the freshest scoops.
